name: Codex for Open Source
description: OpenAI offers 6 months of free ChatGPT Pro with Codex access, API credits, and conditional Codex Security access for open-source maintainers.

perks.title: 6 Months of ChatGPT Pro
perks.description: Free ChatGPT Pro subscription with Codex access for coding, triage, review, and maintainer workflows.

perks.title: API Credits
perks.description: Credits through the Codex Open Source Fund for PR review, automation, release workflows, or core open-source work.

perks.title: Codex Security
perks.description: Conditional access to Codex Security for deeper code security scans and audits on qualified repositories.

eligibility: No hard requirements like GitHub stars or monthly download thresholds.
Must be a primary or core maintainer of an open-source project.
Must demonstrate repository usage, ecosystem importance, and active maintenance.
Must have a valid ChatGPT account.
applicationProcess: Submit through OpenAI's official Codex for OSS form.
Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis.
Selected applicants are notified via email.
